source_template.file_name: Cot IMPO en Brasil GIG 1 pet.xls
source_template.relative_path: BRASIL/GIG/Cot IMPO en Brasil GIG 1 pet.xls

metadata.title: Brazil taxes the import of pets. Total cost is approximately 60% over CIF value + commercial value of the pet.

descriptions.title: Mandatory Import taxes
paragraphs: Mandatory import taxes charged by Receita Federal.

descriptions.title: Home delivery in Metro Rio de Janeiro
paragraphs: LATAM personnel will transport 1 pet from GIG airport to client´s residence in Metro Rio de Janeiro
This price does not include cost of insurance of the animal.
Prices charged by third parties may vary, in which case we will inform if there are
any variation in the customer´s charges.

notes.title: general
paragraphs: There are legal exemptions for foreigners or for Brazilian that return after having lived abroad.

notes.title: general
paragraphs: Please, read the attached file "Import Taxes" and inform LATAM about your tax status.
